revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Request quotation span/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Request quotation span/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Request quotation span/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Request quotation span/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Request quotation span/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Request quotation span/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == '''Do not [[Help:Substitution|substitute]] this template.''' The {{tl|Request quotation span}} template may be used when there is a piece of text that should be verified with quotation from a source. Unlike the template {{tl|Request quotation}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing quotation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that needs quotation among many verified ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is using multiple {{tl|Request quotation}}. Once a quotation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}}, or: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} '''Example of usage:''' :Verified material. {{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. :Verified material. {{Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|Request quotation}}:''' :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} More verified material. :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} More verified material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The text that needs a quotation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the quotation request. If omitted, "Quotation needed from source to verify." will be used. This text is shown as a [[tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a quotation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a quotation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "Quotation needed from source to verify", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a quotation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Redirects to this template == == See also == * {{tl|Request quotation}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates|Quotation]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == '''Do not [[Help:Substitution|substitute]] this template.''' The {{tl|Request quotation span}} template may be used when there is a piece of text that should be verified with quotation from a source. Unlike the template {{tl|Request quotation}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing quotation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that needs quotation among many verified ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is using multiple {{tl|Request quotation}}. Once a quotation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}}, or: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} '''Example of usage:''' :Verified material. {{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. :Verified material. {{Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|Request quotation}}:''' :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} More verified material. :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} More verified material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The text that needs a quotation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the quotation request. If omitted, "Quotation needed from source to verify." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a quotation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a quotation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "Quotation needed from source to verify", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a quotation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Redirects to this template == == See also == * {{tl|Request quotation}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates|Quotation]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == '''Do not [[Help:Substitution|substitute]] this template.''' The {{tl|Request quotation span}} template may be used when there is a piece of text that should be verified with quotation from a source. Unlike the template {{tl|Request quotation}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing quotation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that needs quotation among many verified ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is using multiple {{tl|Request quotation}}. Once a quotation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}}, or: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} '''Example of usage:''' :Verified material. {{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. :Verified material. {{Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|Request quotation}}:''' :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} More verified material. :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} More verified material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The text that needs a quotation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the quotation request. If omitted, "Quotation needed from source to verify." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a quotation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a quotation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "Quotation needed from source to verify", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a quotation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Redirects to this template == == See also == * {{tl|Request quotation}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates|Quotation]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == '''Do not [[Help:Substitution|substitute]] this template.''' The {{tl|Request quotation span}} template may be used when there is a piece of text that should be verified with quotation from a source. Unlike the template {{tl|Request quotation}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing quotation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that needs quotation among many verified ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is using multiple {{tl|Request quotation}}. Once a quotation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}}, or: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} '''Example of usage:''' :Verified material. {{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. :Verified material. {{Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|Request quotation}}:''' :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} More verified material. :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} More verified material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The text that needs a quotation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the quotation request. If omitted, "Quotation needed from source to verify." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a quotation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a quotation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "Quotation needed from source to verify", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a quotation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Redirects to this template == == See also == * {{tl|Request quotation}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates|Quotation]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == '''Do not [[Help:Substitution|substitute]] this template.''' The {{tl|Request quotation span}} template may be used when there is a piece of text that should be verified with quotation from a source. Unlike the template {{tl|Request quotation}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing quotation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that needs quotation among many verified ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is using multiple {{tl|Request quotation}}. Once a quotation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}}, or: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} '''Example of usage:''' :Verified material. {{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. :Verified material. {{Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|Request quotation}}:''' :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} More verified material. :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} More verified material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The text that needs a quotation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the quotation request. If omitted, "Quotation needed from source to verify." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a quotation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a quotation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "Quotation needed from source to verify", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a quotation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Redirects to this template == == See also == * {{tl|Request quotation}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates|Quotation]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == '''Do not [[Help:Substitution|substitute]] this template.''' The {{tl|Request quotation span}} template may be used when there is a piece of text that should be verified with quotation from a source. Unlike the template {{tl|Request quotation}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing quotation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that needs quotation among many verified ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is using multiple {{tl|Request quotation}}. Once a quotation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}}, or: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} '''Example of usage:''' :Verified material. {{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. :Verified material. {{Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|Request quotation}}:''' :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} More verified material. :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} More verified material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The text that needs a quotation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the quotation request. If omitted, "Quotation needed from source to verify." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a quotation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a quotation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "Quotation needed from source to verify", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a quotation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Redirects to this template == == See also == * {{tl|Request quotation}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates|Quotation]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == '''Do not [[Help:Substitution|substitute]] this template.''' The {{tl|Request quotation span}} template may be used when there is a piece of text that should be verified with quotation from a source. Unlike the template {{tl|Request quotation}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing quotation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that needs quotation among many verified ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is using multiple {{tl|Request quotation}}. Once a quotation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}}, or: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|Request quotation span|Passage(s) to be verified with quotation}} '''Example of usage:''' :Verified material. {{tlx|Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. :Verified material. {{Request quotation span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be verified with quotation. Another passage to be verified with quotation.}} More verified material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|Request quotation}}:''' :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{tlx|Request quotation}} More verified material. :Verified material. Passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} Another passage to be verified with quotation.{{Request quotation}} More verified material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The text that needs a quotation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the quotation request. If omitted, "Quotation needed from source to verify." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a quotation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a quotation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "Quotation needed from source to verify", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a quotation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Redirects to this template == == See also == * {{tl|Request quotation}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Quotation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates|Quotation]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
